design_philosophy: ECO-CULTURE bridges urban living with natural organic farming. The design must be uncluttered, emphasizing negative space. Use generous padding (p-8, p-12). Images of fresh produce should serve as the primary color source alongside our brand's Deep Forest Green. Use clean, solid cards without heavy drop shadows to create a high-end, trustworthy feel.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. Allow content to breathe. Use a mix of The Tetris Grid (asymmetrical bento) for marketing and The Control Room Grid for the client dashboard.

cards.style: Flat solid surfaces with subtle 1px border. No drop shadows. For product cards, use rounded-2xl with overflow-hidden and absolute positioning for tags.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-all
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-all

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b-2 border-border focus:border-primary rounded-none px-0 py-3 transition-colors outline-none
inputs.label: text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground mb-1 block

navigation.style: Sticky header with crystal glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/80 border-b border-border/40). Minimal links, prominent cart icon.

interactions.hover: Subtle scale up on images (1.05), primary color text highlights on links.
interactions.loading: Smooth fade-ins, minimalist skeleton loaders matching the bento grid shape.

instructions_to_main_agent: Setup Google Fonts 'Outfit' for headings and 'Manrope' for body text.
Use Shadcn UI components for complex interactions (Dropdowns, Tabs for B2C/B2B login, Dialogs) but heavily customize them to remove the default tech look by adhering to the 'components' guidelines.
Use 'lucide-react' for crisp, minimalist line icons.
Ensure all copy is in Spanish as requested.
Implement a unified Client Dashboard layout using 'The Control Room Grid' pattern.
For the e-commerce catalog, use large imagery and clear whitespace. Price and 'Add to Cart' should be immediately accessible.
All interactive elements must include 'data-testid' for robust testing.
For the Urban Garden community registration feature, utilize a clean, multi-step Shadcn form.
Maintain the light, earthy, bone-white background (#FAF9F6) to make the green produce pop.
